docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY TRAN, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRAN, MARY AS TO DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-27-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MARY TRAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP (ASAD ANWER) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ASAD ANWER FILED BY DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, MARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK $450.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2025 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT U.S. BANCORP DBA US BANK
